proposal1.heroHeadline: LaborIQ is losing $57,600 annually to proposals that should take 47 seconds.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manual proposal creation eats into your expertise in creating fair pay bands. Automate it in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are measurable losses that LaborIQ faces daily.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Each proposal takes 4 hours. With 15 proposals monthly, that's 60 hours. At $75/hour, it's $54,000 per year in lost time for salary analysis expertise.

problems.title: Revenue Leakage
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean delayed deals. If just 5% of your proposals close late, you lose $200,000 annually in potential revenue growth.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: Manual processes mean you're slower than competitors using automated systems. This lag results in missing out on $120,000 worth of contracts annually.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent proposal branding can confuse potential clients, risking a 10% drop in proposal acceptance rates. That's $40,000 in lost opportunities.

problems.title: Missed Follow-Up
problems.description: Without automated follow-ups, 20% of leads go cold. This oversight costs you $80,000 in potential earnings annually.

problems.title: Scaling Bottleneck
problems.description: With 21 employees, scaling proposal output strains resources. Missing out on scaling costs you 15% in potential market reach, or $600,000.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system directly addresses these costly issues.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, crafting a proposal means hours of manual work. Our system completes it in 47 seconds, freeing up $54,000 in valuable time.

solutions.title: 24/7 AI Chatbot
solutions.description: Missed follow-ups cost you opportunities. The AI chatbot handles objections and books meetings instantly, capturing $80,000 in lost potential.

solutions.title: Branded Consistency
solutions.description: Inconsistent branding can confuse clients. Our system ensures every proposal is perfectly branded, improving acceptance rates by 10%.

solutions.title: Behavioral Tracking
solutions.description: Without insights, opportunities slip away. Full proposal behavioral tracking enhances follow-ups, closing $200,000 more in deals.

solutions.title: Scalable Proposal Output
solutions.description: Limited team size restricts your reach. Our system scales effortlessly, unlocking 15% more market potential worth $600,000.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for LaborIQ's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for LaborIQ around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for LaborIQ.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Talent Strategy with a 20% Reduction in Hiring Costs.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Engage LaborIQ to optimize your workforce planning in just 12 weeks for measurable cost savings.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing measurable financial losses due to inefficient talent management.

problems.title: High Turnover Costs
problems.description: Acme Corp experiences a turnover rate of 15%, costing approximately $1.2 million annually in retraining and lost productivity.

problems.title: Slow Time-to-Hire
problems.description: Current time-to-hire averages 45 days, resulting in $250,000 lost productivity annually due to unfilled roles.

problems.title: Inaccurate Salary Benchmarking
problems.description: Overpaying by 10% on average, costing Acme Corp $500,000 annually in excess salary expenses.

problems.title: Low Employee Engagement
problems.description: Only 60% of employees are engaged, resulting in $350,000 of lost productivity each year.

problems.title: Inefficient Workforce Planning
problems.description: Lack of strategic workforce planning leads to $300,000 in missed revenue opportunities annually.

problems.title: Lack of Data-Driven Decisions
problems.description: Without analytics, Acme Corp potentially misses $200,000 in cost-saving opportunities every year.

proposal2.solutionIntro: LaborIQ offers tailored solutions to address these quantified financial challenges.

solutions.title: Salary Benchmarking Analysis
solutions.description: Solves inaccurate salary benchmarking. Provides comprehensive salary data and market insights to adjust compensation plans. Expected outcome: Align salaries to save $500,000 annually.

solutions.title: Talent Acquisition Optimization
solutions.description: Addresses slow time-to-hire. Implements streamlined hiring processes and tools. Expected outcome: Reduce time-to-hire to 30 days, saving $250,000 annually.

solutions.title: Employee Engagement Strategy
solutions.description: Improves low employee engagement. Develops tailored programs and tracking for engagement. Expected outcome: Increase engagement by 20%, boosting productivity by $350,000 annually.

solutions.title: Strategic Workforce Planning
solutions.description: Solves inefficient workforce planning. Delivers a data-driven staffing strategy to align with business goals. Expected outcome: Capture $300,000 in additional revenue opportunities.

metrics.label: Reduction in hiring costs within 3 months.
Increase in employee engagement within 6 months.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach

pricing.description: Ideal for smaller teams seeking foundational improvements.

proposal2.ctaHeadline: Ready to Transform Your Talent Strategy?
proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how LaborIQ can drive measurable results for Acme Corp. Schedule a conversation today.

lead.company_description:
LaborIQ provides HR teams with salary benchmarks to compete for new hires and retain employees in today's market.

Thousands of users trust LaborIQ to provide salary recommendations that help close pay gaps, ease pay transparency challenges, fill jobs faster and reduce turnover. 

We believe that traditional salary surveys and crowd-sourced data are lagged and unreliable in today's evolving job market. For companies to compete for talent and succeed, they must have access to unmatched compensation data quality.
lead.headline: Advance Your Compensation Strategy In A Moving Market With Current, Validated Salary Recommendations.
